questions.name: DSA - Lists: Inserting a Node at the Beginning of a List
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code. You have the head of a list `head` and a new node `newNode`. Write a single line of code that links `newNode` to the current head of the list (so that `newNode` points to `head`). Your answer should not contain any extra spaces.

questions.name: DSA - Lists: Pointer to the End of a List
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code. You have a node `temp`, which is the last node in the list. Write a line that links a new node `last` to the end of `temp`. Your answer should not contain any extra spaces.
